CREATE TABLE test_arrays (arr1 Array(String), arr2 Array(Int32));
CREATE TABLE nested_test (arr1 Array(String), arr2 Array(Int32), arr3 Array(Float64));
SELECT arrayZip(arrayZip(arr1, arr2), arr3) FROM nested_test;
CREATE TABLE combined_test (key UInt32, value1 Array(String), value2 Array(Int32));
SELECT key, arrayZip(value1, value2) FROM combined_test WHERE key = 1;
CREATE VIEW view_test AS SELECT arr1, arr2 FROM test_arrays WHERE arraySize(arr1) = arraySize(arr2);
CREATE TABLE join_test (id UInt32, vals Array(String));
SELECT id, arrayZip(vals, arrayZip(['x', 'y'], [10, 20])) FROM join_test;
CREATE TABLE multiple_arrays (arr1 Array(Int32), arr2 Array(Int32), arr3 Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayZip(arr1, arrayZip(arr2, arr3)) FROM multiple_arrays;
